query: SELECT COUNT(*) as jogadores_com_time FROM players p WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM teams t WHERE t.name = p.club); SELECT p.club, t.id as teamId, t.logoUrl FROM players p JOIN teams t ON t.name = p.club GROUP BY p.club, t.id, t.logoUrl LIMIT 15;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35VGbBGUduuhukx.298441852ba3 --database hhB4oykfDQM9yCvhQGaX3n --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as jogadores_com_time FROM players p WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM teams t WHERE t.name = p.club); SELECT p.club, t.id as teamId, t.logoUrl FROM players p JOIN teams t ON t.name = p.club GROUP BY p.club, t.id, t.logoUrl LIMIT 15;
